title: Create Ticket model and migrations
exit_criteria: Ticket table exists with `codigo` and `pedidoId`. Pedido has many Tickets.

title: Implement Ticket Generation API
exit_criteria: Endpoints handle creating N tickets for an order and retrieving them.

title: Implement Public Tracking API
exit_criteria: Endpoint returns order summary and items based on ticket code without leaking sensitive data.

title: Add Ticket Generation UI
outputs: GenerateTickets modal/button in Order Detail view
exit_criteria: User can specify number of tickets and trigger API call.

title: Build Thermal Print Template
exit_criteria: Template matches 58mm/80mm width. QR code renders correctly. Print triggers using standard CSS @media print or react-to-print.

title: Design and Build Customer Tracking Page
exit_criteria: Page fetches tracking API and displays a premium UI using frontend-design rules and GSAP for micro-animations.
